taker_first_entry_policy_risk.stake_fraction_note: research_stake_fraction_cap is a conservative per-signal bankroll fraction for paper trading; it is capped at 0.25% while there are fewer than 10 selected forward days.

top_filters.description: Cheap-side ask depth across 5 levels >= 1000 shares.
5s BTC return is aligned with intended side by at least 0 bps.

taker_first_entry_policy_regimes.interpretation: Selected-policy regime analysis used order_25_2s_2c_risk_adjusted: 158 signals, 117 fills, 11.7% planned-cost ROI, and 6.5% max drawdown. 8 simple pre-trade filters lifted ROI while keeping enough sample. The top diagnostic filter is signal_depth_gte_1000 with 108 signals, 13.6% ROI, and 8.7% max drawdown. No tested filter both lifted ROI and reduced drawdown; the top ROI filter changes drawdown by 2.2%. This is an in-sample two-forward-day diagnostic, so treat filters as paper-trading candidates only.

selected_filter.description: Cheap-side ask depth across 5 levels >= 1000 shares.

top_train_candidates.description: Cheap-side ask depth across 5 levels >= 1000 shares.
Cheap-side ask depth across 5 levels >= 500 shares.
No additional regime filter; selected policy as-is.

taker_first_entry_policy_regime_walkforw.interpretation: Prior-only regime-filter validation used risk_adjusted selection on 1 fold(s). The top sample-gated selected-filter policy was order_25_2s_2c_risk_adjusted: selected-filter ROI -2.5%, unfiltered same-day ROI 5.1%, and ROI lift -7.6%. 1/1 fold(s) met the next-day sample gate and 0/1 both improved ROI and reduced drawdown. Only 1 fold(s) are available because selected-policy replay currently spans two forward days.

top_train_candidates.description: No EV overlay; selected execution policy as-is.

taker_first_entry_policy_ev_overlay.interpretation: Prior-only EV overlay validation for base_ev_model used risk_adjusted threshold selection on 1 fold(s). The top sample-gated policy was order_10_any_execution_risk_adjusted: overlay ROI 6.2%, unfiltered same-day ROI 6.2%, and ROI lift 0.0%. 1/1 fold(s) met the next-day sample gate and 0/1 both improved ROI and reduced drawdown.

taker_ev_calibration.interpretation: Train-only calibration for base_ev_model increased pooled-positive EV thresholds from 0 to 2, but did not clear the day-stability gate. Best calibrated pooled test ROI on cost is 8.3% at min_pred_ev=0.1. Keep it research-only.

taker_ev_calibration_wallet_flow.interpretation: Train-only calibration for wallet_flow_ev_model increased pooled-positive EV thresholds from 0 to 1, but did not clear the day-stability gate. Best calibrated pooled test ROI on cost is 7.3% at min_pred_ev=0.15. Keep it research-only.

taker_ev_feature_ablation.interpretation: Feature ablation found pooled-positive EV thresholds in 2/6 groups, but none passed the day-stability gate. The best pooled group is btc_path_quote_depth with test AUC 0.785. Highest raw AUC is btc_path_quote_depth at 0.785.

interpretation: The inclusion unit is a complete clean 5-minute market; model-ready coverage now has 849 such markets. Full-day continuity is preferred context, not a hard gate: 0 full 288-window days and 3 days with at least 50% of expected windows; the best day has 259/288 windows. 668 feature rows used source-tagged backup BTC prices. The maker 1c proxy has 30 positive coarse rules, but none pass the day-stability gate, so they remain fragile fill-proxy diagnostics. Queue-aware maker 1c walk-forward is stricter: 0/960 rules pass (0/8640 order/horizon rows; best pooled planned-cost ROI is -6.4%). Keep maker 1c disabled until this gate turns positive. The coarse taker-rule search has 38 pooled holdout-positive rules and 7 day-stable rules. Treat them as candidates for deeper latency-cost modeling, not live edges. With at most one taker entry per market, 73 rule variants are holdout-positive and 36 pass the day-stability gate; the strongest variants still only span 3 test days, so they need more clean-market coverage before sizing. Latency stress keeps 7/7 day-stable taker rules alive at 2s latency with a 2c slippage cap, but 0/7 survive at 10s with the same cap. First-entry execution sizing stress shows 35/36 rules still passing for $5 orders at 2s latency and a 2c cap (average fill rate 69.6%); $25 orders have 21/36 passing (average fill rate 60.8%). This suggests top-of-book size is not the main blocker at these small sizes in the current clean sample. Dense-day walk-forward validation is stricter: 1/36 day-stable first-entry variants pass with up to 2 eligible forward folds. This makes the current edge evidence fragile until more clean dense days are collected. Combined execution walk-forward is the strictest current gate: 16/36 rules pass at least one order/latency/slippage setting (352 parameter rows). At 2s latency and a 2c cap, $5 has 8/8 eligible rules passing and $25 has 8/8. Prior-selected execution policy validation is the closest current bot simulation: 11/11 policies pass across 2 selected forward folds. The best passing policy is order_25_2s_2c_risk_adjusted with pooled planned-cost ROI 11.7%, 74.1% fill rate, and worst-fold ROI 5.1%. This still needs more forward folds. Market-level replay of that selected-policy family has 158 signals, 117 simulated full top-of-book fills, 11.7% planned-cost ROI, and 6.5% max drawdown on planned cost. The day-bootstrap 5th percentile is 5.1%; the research-only per-signal cap is 0.25% while the selected forward-day count stays small. Selected-policy regime analysis used order_25_2s_2c_risk_adjusted: 158 signals, 117 fills, 11.7% planned-cost ROI, and 6.5% max drawdown. 8 simple pre-trade filters lifted ROI while keeping enough sample. The top diagnostic filter is signal_depth_gte_1000 with 108 signals, 13.6% ROI, and 8.7% max drawdown. No tested filter both lifted ROI and reduced drawdown; the top ROI filter changes drawdown by 2.2%. This is an in-sample two-forward-day diagnostic, so treat filters as paper-trading candidates only. Prior-only regime-filter validation used risk_adjusted selection on 1 fold(s). The top sample-gated selected-filter policy was order_25_2s_2c_risk_adjusted: selected-filter ROI -2.5%, unfiltered same-day ROI 5.1%, and ROI lift -7.6%. 1/1 fold(s) met the next-day sample gate and 0/1 both improved ROI and reduced drawdown. Only 1 fold(s) are available because selected-policy replay currently spans two forward days. Train-only calibration for base_ev_model increased pooled-positive EV thresholds from 0 to 2, but did not clear the day-stability gate. Best calibrated pooled test ROI on cost is 8.3% at min_pred_ev=0.1. Keep it research-only. Train-only calibration for wallet_flow_ev_model increased pooled-positive EV thresholds from 0 to 1, but did not clear the day-stability gate. Best calibrated pooled test ROI on cost is 7.3% at min_pred_ev=0.15. Keep it research-only. Prior-only EV overlay validation for base_ev_model used risk_adjusted threshold selection on 1 fold(s). The top sample-gated policy was order_10_any_execution_risk_adjusted: overlay ROI 6.2%, unfiltered same-day ROI 6.2%, and ROI lift 0.0%. 1/1 fold(s) met the next-day sample gate and 0/1 both improved ROI and reduced drawdown. Prior-only EV overlay validation for wallet_flow_ev_model used risk_adjusted threshold selection on 1 fold(s). The top sample-gated policy was order_25_2s_2c_risk_adjusted: overlay ROI 5.8%, unfiltered same-day ROI 5.1%, and ROI lift 0.8%. 1/1 fold(s) met the next-day sample gate and 1/1 both improved ROI and reduced drawdown. Prior-only EV overlay validation for base_ev_model_calibrated used risk_adjusted threshold selection on 1 fold(s). The top sample-gated policy was order_10_any_execution_risk_adjusted: overlay ROI 6.2%, unfiltered same-day ROI 6.2%, and ROI lift 0.0%. 1/1 fold(s) met the next-day sample gate and 0/1 both improved ROI and reduced drawdown. The top sample-gated policy was order_10_any_execution_risk_adjusted: overlay ROI 6.2%, unfiltered same-day ROI 6.2%, and ROI lift 0.0%. 1/1 fold(s) met the next-day sample gate and 0/1 both improved ROI and reduced drawdown. Feature ablation found pooled-positive EV thresholds in 2/6 groups, but none passed the day-stability gate. The best pooled group is btc_path_quote_depth with test AUC 0.785. Highest raw AUC is btc_path_quote_depth at 0.785.
